metadata.title: AI Document Processing & Parser | 99.99% Accuracy
metadata.description: AI document processing and document parsing API with 99.5% accuracy. Extract structured data from PDFs, images, invoices, and contracts — output as Markdown, JSON, or XML. Built for LLM, RAG, and enterprise document data extraction workflows. Free 100 credits to start.
metadata.keywords: AI document processing, document parsing, PDF parser, OCR, invoice extraction, contract parsing, LLM document, RAG pipeline, structured data extraction, markdown conversion

hero.subtitle: Get your documents ready for gen AI

standard.title: Standard Parsing
standard.desc: High-accuracy layout & structure recognition for PDFs and documents.

vlm.title: VLM Parsing
vlm.desc: Vision-Language Model (VLM) — Understands images within documents or image files and describes them in natural language.

free_banner.desc: Create a free account to instantly parse PDFs and images with no usage limits. Supports all formats including scanned documents and handwritten forms.

trust_badges: Sign in with Google or Email

use_cases.label: Use Cases
use_cases.heading: AI Document Parser for Every Workflow, Document Data Extraction
use_cases.subheading: From extracting data from PDFs to parsing resumes and bank statements — one API handles every document type your application needs.
use_cases.cta_heading: Ready to parse your first document?
use_cases.cta_sub: Sign in and get 100 free credits. No credit card required.

items.description: Extract structured data from any PDF — financial reports, research papers, scanned invoices, and more. Output as JSON, Markdown, CSV, or XML with normalized coordinates for every element. Ideal for building RAG pipelines, LLM applications, and automated document workflows.

Automatically extract candidate information from resumes and CVs in any format — PDF, Word, or image scans. Structured output includes name, contact, skills, work experience, and education fields. Plug directly into your ATS or HR automation pipeline.

Convert bank statements from any institution into clean, structured CSV or JSON. Automatically extract transaction dates, descriptions, debit/credit amounts, and running balances. Supports multi-page statements, foreign currency accounts, and scanned PDFs.

Scale document extraction across your entire organization. Batch process thousands of documents via API, trigger webhooks on completion, and integrate with your existing data pipelines. Supports Word, Excel, PowerPoint, HTML, and 50+ formats alongside PDF.

Digitize handwritten forms, notes, prescriptions, and receipts with high accuracy. Our multi-engine OCR handles mixed printed and handwritten content on the same page, supporting both English and multilingual documents.

Extract key clauses, parties, dates, obligations, and defined terms from contracts, NDAs, and regulatory filings. Accelerate legal review and due diligence with structured, machine-readable output ready for your LLM or contract analysis platform.

brand.title: xparse
brand.description: AI-powered document parsing that converts PDFs, images, and office files into clean, LLM-ready Markdown and structured JSON — in seconds.
